title: Claims Guidance 1
chunk_text: Claim status updates should only confirm receipt, review stage, and whether more documentation is needed. Use the approved template where the request is straightforward.

title: Claims Guidance 2
chunk_text: If a claim attachment is unreadable, the agent should request a clearer copy before assessment. Record the member ID and policy number in the case notes.

title: Renewals Guidance 1
chunk_text: Where a member asks for lower-cost options, the response should invite a review of plan level, excess, and hospital network. Use the approved template where the request is straightforward.

title: Renewals Guidance 2
chunk_text: Where a member asks for lower-cost options, the response should invite a review of plan level, excess, and hospital network. Use the approved template where the request is straightforward.

title: Billing Guidance 1
chunk_text: Payment issue responses should confirm whether a failed direct debit, expired card, or timing issue is visible on the account. Acknowledge receipt before requesting missing documents.

chunk_text: Bank details or card updates must not be requested over plain email unless the secure update process is referenced. Record the member ID and policy number in the case notes.

title: Complaints Guidance 1
chunk_text: Do not admit liability in complaint responses; confirm the concern has been logged for review. Escalate to a senior agent if documentation is contradictory.

chunk_text: Where service delay caused concern, apologise for the experience without pre-judging the outcome. Acknowledge receipt before requesting missing documents.
